case h.left.a

hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
i : d
⊢ WithLp.toLp 2
      (((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix
                ⇑(@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) *

            ((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix
                ⇑(@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB)).conjTranspose).col
        i) =
    EuclideanSpace.single i
      (((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix
              ⇑(@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) *
            A *
          ((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix
              ⇑(@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB)).conjTranspose)
        i i)

have h := Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.star_mul_self_mul_IsDiag hA hB hAB
    simp only [Matrix.sharedEigenvectorUnitary, star_eq_conjTranspose] at h
    rw [Matrix.isDiag_iff] at h
    ext j
    simp only [WithLp.toLp_apply, col_apply, EuclideanSpace.single_apply]
    by_cases hij : i = j
    · simp [hij]
    · rw [h hij, if_neg (Ne.symm hij)]

    simp only [star_eq_conjTranspose, sharedEigenvectorUnitary] at hD
    ext j
    simp only [WithLp.toLp_apply, col_apply, EuclideanSpace.single_apply]
    by_cases hij : j = i
    · simp [hij]
    · have := hD.apply_ne fun h => hij h.symm
      simp [this, hij]

have h := Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.star_mul_self_mul_IsDiag hA hB hAB
    rw [Matrix.isDiag_iff_diagonal_diag] at h
    ext j
    simp only [EuclideanSpace.single_apply, WithLp.toLp_apply, col_apply]
    by_cases hij : i = j
    · subst hij; simp
    · have hdiag : ((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix ⇑(sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB) *
          A * ((EuclideanSpace.basisFun d 𝕜).toBasis.toMatrix ⇑(sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB)).conjTranspose) j i = 0 := by
        rw [← star_eq_conjTranspose] at h ⊢
        have := congr_fun (congr_fun h j) i
        simp only [diagonal_apply, diag_apply] at this
        simp [hij, this]
      simp [hdiag, hij]
